sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n91740" key="puri/ths2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῡρίτης</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῑ] ἄρτος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n91740.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wheaten</tr_> loaf, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg002:263" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.263</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
